examples: Here I love you and hides you in wain.
The wain was quite popular in the past for farm use.
Of all pains, the greatest pain, is to love, but love in wain.
The blog has also trashed Mr Wain's book, which has been held up at Malaysian customs.
In Ireland this time of year is Samhain (sow-wain), in America, we call it Halloween and in Latin America, El Dia DeL Muerto, The Day of the Dead.
